mapper.sql: id, assetNum, assetName, assetCategory, assetType, assetHost, assetOpenPorts, assetDeployInfo, assetUsage, customerName, industryCode, assetAS, assetASVersion, assetASIdentify, assetASFramework, middlewareName, middlewareVersion, developerBrand, assetOS, assetOSVersion, assetDB, assetDBVersion, customInfo, status, trackStatus, trackedTime, disabled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into af_industry_asset (assetNum, assetName, assetCategory, assetType, assetHost, assetOpenPorts, assetDeployInfo, assetUsage, customerName, industryCode, assetAS, assetASVersion, assetASIdentify, assetASFramework, middlewareName, middlewareVersion, developerBrand, assetOS, assetOSVersion, assetDB, assetDBVersion, customInfo, status, trackStatus, trackedTime, disabled, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime ) values (#{assetNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetOpenPorts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetDeployInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetUsage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{industryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetAS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetASVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetASIdentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetASFramework,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{middlewareName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{middlewareVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{developerBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetOS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetOSVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetDB,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetDBVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

mapper.update:
update af_industry_asset
assetNum = #{assetNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetName = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetCategory = #{assetCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetType = #{assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetHost = #{assetHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetOpenPorts = #{assetOpenPorts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetDeployInfo = #{assetDeployInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetUsage = #{assetUsage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerName = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
industryCode = #{industryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetAS = #{assetAS,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetASVersion = #{assetASVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetASIdentify = #{assetASIdentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetASFramework = #{assetASFramework,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
middlewareName = #{middlewareName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
middlewareVersion = #{middlewareVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
developerBrand = #{developerBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetOS = #{assetOS,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetOSVersion = #{assetOSVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetDB = #{assetDB,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
assetDBVersion = #{assetDBVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customInfo = #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trackStatus = #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
trackedTime = #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update af_industry_asset set assetNum = #{assetNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetName = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetCategory = #{assetCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetType = #{assetType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetHost = #{assetHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetOpenPorts = #{assetOpenPorts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetDeployInfo = #{assetDeployInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetUsage = #{assetUsage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerName = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, industryCode = #{industryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetAS = #{assetAS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetASVersion = #{assetASVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetASIdentify = #{assetASIdentify,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetASFramework = #{assetASFramework,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, middlewareName = #{middlewareName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, middlewareVersion = #{middlewareVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, developerBrand = #{developerBrand,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetOS = #{assetOS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetOSVersion = #{assetOSVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetDB = #{assetDB,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assetDBVersion = #{assetDBVersion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customInfo = #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trackStatus = #{trackStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, trackedTime = #{trackedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

trim.if: ( l.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

mapper.select:
select * from af_industry_asset as l
l.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.assetNum = #{assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetName = #{assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetCategory = #{assetCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetType = #{assetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetHost = #{assetHost, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

l.assetASFramework = #{assetASFramework, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.middlewareName = #{middlewareName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.middlewareVersion = #{middlewareVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.developerBrand = #{developerBrand, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetOS = #{assetOS, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetOSVersion = #{assetOSVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetDB = #{assetDB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetDBVersion = #{assetDBVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customInfo = #{customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
l.status = #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackStatus = #{trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select * from af_industry_asset as l
l.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.assetNum = #{model.assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetName = #{model.assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetCategory = #{model.assetCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetType = #{model.assetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetHost = #{model.assetHost, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetOpenPorts = #{model.assetOpenPorts, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

l.assetUsage = #{model.assetUsage, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customerName = #{model.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.industryCode = #{model.industryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

l.middlewareName = #{model.middlewareName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.middlewareVersion = #{model.middlewareVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

l.assetOSVersion = #{model.assetOSVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetDB = #{model.assetDB, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetDBVersion = #{model.assetDBVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
l.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( l.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

select count(1) from af_industry_asset as l
l.id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.assetNum = #{model.assetNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetName = #{model.assetName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetCategory = #{model.assetCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetType = #{model.assetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetHost = #{model.assetHost, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetOpenPorts = #{model.assetOpenPorts, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetDeployInfo = #{model.assetDeployInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.assetUsage = #{model.assetUsage, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

l.industryCode = #{model.industryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

l.assetASVersion = #{model.assetASVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

l.assetDBVersion = #{model.assetDBVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

l.status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackStatus = #{model.trackStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
l.trackedTime = #{model.trackedTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.disabled = #{model.disabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
l.createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
l.updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
l.updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( l.assetNum like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetHost like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOpenPorts like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDeployInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetUsage like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.industryCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetAS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASIdentify like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetASFramework like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.middlewareName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.middlewareVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.developerBrand like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOS like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetOSVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDB like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.assetDBVersion like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or l.updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
